gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward slightly, glances around at the colorful objects, and gestures with open arms to invite attention.
a tutor leans forward and tilts the head inquisitively while spreading arms to the side in a welcoming manner.
a tutor raises both hands and moves them in a sweeping motion to indicate grouping the objects together.
a tutor points toward the screen with one hand while using the other to count off in the air, showcasing the groups.
a tutor steps to the side and motions with both hands as if starting the process of creating groups with enthusiasm.
a tutor holds up a finger to emphasize counting, nods encouragingly, and gestures toward multiple areas in front.
a person stands tall and opens arms wide, nodding while conveying that multiplication is about adding equal groups.
a tutor claps hands together with a big smile, stepping forward to celebrate the learning moments shared with the class.
